description: AI-powered Telegram finance tracker skill running on OpenClaw. It categorizes receipts, reconciles bank CSVs, flags tax deductions, separates personal vs business expenses, tracks income and balances, and writes to the user's Google Sheets.
core_problem: People lose tax deductions and visibility because they track expenses manually in spreadsheets and cannot easily reconcile receipts, statements, and business vs personal spending.
primary_promise: Stop losing tax deductions in a spreadsheet by using an AI-powered Telegram tracker that auto-categorizes receipts, reconciles bank CSVs, separates personal vs business expenses, and flags tax deductions.
key_features: Bank CSV reconciliation (Chase, Discover, Citi, Wells Fargo)
Self-hosted on OpenClaw with data in user's Google Sheets
positioning_notes: Do not over-position this as Airbnb-only. Position it as any tax-deductible expense tracker for freelancers, landlords, home businesses, and side hustlers. Emphasize privacy, self-hosting, Telegram interface, and Google Sheets ownership.
